html:
Hi I'm Jia Wei, a software developer passionate about building great user experiences. I can turn a design into a real working website with responsive design.

Recently I've been focusing on AI-driven development — using tools like Claude Code and GitHub Copilot to assist my workflow, while integrating OpenAI SDK and Vercel AI SDK into my projects to connect with AI models. I believe AI is the future of software development, and I enjoy exploring how it can enhance both developer productivity and end-user experience.

I graduated from Universiti Utara Malaysia with a degree in Bachelor of Science (Multimedia).

I am a positive thinker, and I think this helps me the most in difficult moments.
